author: bkauii_ensō
msg:
Tmobile only allows 2 internet lines/house. I already had Tmobile home internet. I wanted a back up internet and some how the site let me order 3 backups in 3 different orders placed back to back. Well I received all 3 backups today. They only wanted to activate 1 not the other 2 backups. But 2.5 hrs later and some social engineering about why my kids each need a back up internet for their rooms. I now have 3 back up internets($25 each) and Tmobile home internet($52) that brings my home internet connection points to 11 ISPs
Cable, Fiber, Starlink, Verizon 5g Box, Tmobile 5g Box, 3 Tmobile Backups, 3 MintMobile Sims in Sim Router. I have a 4th Sim and 3 MintMobile Home Minternets. That will put me up to 15 connections with 20 phones on each
